coverage_note: The bundled PTEN population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from PTEN PIP3 dephosphorylation, AKT pathway restraint, cell growth control, genomic stability, and tumor-suppressor biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000171862: PTEN coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: PTEN findings should be read against PIP3 dephosphorylation, AKT pathway restraint, cell growth control, genomic stability, and tumor-suppressor biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

PTEN loss-of-function model is curated as a PTEN marker for PTEN hamartoma tumor syndrome review context, PI3K-AKT pathway regulation; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

PTEN promoter/regulatory loss model is curated as a PTEN marker for PTEN hamartoma tumor syndrome review context, PI3K-AKT pathway regulation; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
